name: Drawer
description: A slide-out panel component that appears from screen edges with header, body, footer sections, and smooth animations for displaying supplementary content or navigation.
usage_guidelines: Use for navigation menus, filters, or detailed information panels.
Choose placement based on content type (right for details, left for navigation).
Provide title for clear context of drawer content.
Use footer for action buttons or additional controls.
Set appropriate width/height based on content needs.

bodyClass.description: CSS classes for the drawer body section.

contentClassName.description: CSS classes for the drawer content container.

footerClass.description: CSS classes for the footer section.

headerClass.description: CSS classes for the header section.

lockScroll.description: Prevents body scrolling when drawer is open.

onClose.description: Callback fired when drawer is closed.

onOpen.description: Callback fired when drawer is opened.

overlayClassName.description: CSS classes for the backdrop overlay.

placement.description: Edge from which drawer slides in.

shouldCloseOnEsc.description: Closes drawer when pressing Escape key.

styling_info.visual_description: A panel that slides in from screen edges with smooth animation. Includes header with title and close button, scrollable body content, and optional footer. Backdrop overlay dims the background.

Do: Use for supplementary content that doesn't require full attention
Use appropriate placement for content type
Include action buttons in footer when needed
Dont: Don't use for critical actions (use Dialog instead)
Don't make drawers too wide (blocks too much content)
Don't forget to handle onClose callback
Don't define space css to the drawer, as its already come with 16px spacing for the body, header & footer

Basic.title: Basic

Closable.title: Closable

CustomStyle.title: Custom Style

Footer.title: Footer

Placement.title: Placement

WidthHeight.title: Width Height
